commands.review_summary:
The PR resets the channel progress draft gate state when onStart rejects and adds regression tests for timer-triggered and direct noteWork failure paths.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +38. Total +44 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main marks the gate started before params.onStart resolves, and noteWork returns true once started remains set. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: A maintainer can review the narrow patch, but merge should wait for contributor-supplied real behavior proof rather than an automated repair.
